prompt:
Scene:
A square standalone composition for Banksy Street Satire built as a complete one-shot study rather than a reference-dependent variant. The framing should be strong and direct, with a clean lighting plan, intentional tonal control, and enough detail density to reward inspection without losing first-glance clarity.

Subject:
Translate the theme into a single decisive hero concept. Use A Prompt Atlas theme for Banksy Street Satire, testing reasoning-composition, style-transfer with GPT Image 2. as fuel, but do not repeat the series composition. The subject should feel self-sufficient, with a different staging logic, different object hierarchy, and a fresh center of gravity.

Important details:
This image should test the theme from another angle while still meeting the same bar for structure and style. Use reasoning-composition, style-transfer to keep it disciplined. The hard part is the theme needs concept, composition, and finish to arrive in one image. Success means the image should read as difficult, coherent, and immediately persuasive.

Use case:
Banksy Street Satire single study 5/8, independent hero interpretation.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio, avoid accidental continuity with the series camera setup, avoid empty background filler, avoid generic stock composition, and avoid weak focal hierarchy.
title: Hero Study
description: An independent hero image that interprets Banksy Street Satire through a fresh composition and decisive focal hierarchy.
